name: American Express Blue Business Cash™ Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn up to $750 cash back in the form of a statement credit after you spend $6,000 in eligible purchases on your Card within your first 6 months of Card Membership.

earning_rates.notes: 2% cash back on all eligible purchases on the first $50,000 per calendar year; then 1%

other_benefits: Expanded buying power (ability to spend beyond credit limit when needed)
0% intro APR on purchases for 12 months from account opening (then variable APR)
